event_blocks.summary: Sunlight streams through blinds, casting striped shadows across a modern living space with a green leafy plant and seating area, accompanied by gentle piano and string music. A hand stirs a colorful stir-fry in a white pan, and a woman in a white shirt eats it with chopsticks. In a kitchen, wearing a beige hoodie, she prepares a smoothie in a clear glass jar with a spoon. In a study, the woman, wearing glasses and a beige zip-up hoodie, sits at a desk with a silver laptop, noting its greasy keyboard, reinforced by on-screen text. Muffled male voice audio discusses a medical or legal case, 'where we got a lawyer who I wrote the medical part... apartment complex people causes him to this school and he would end up dead from that, right?'. After a huff, the woman, with a slightly hoarse voice, explains it's her second semester of first-year medical school and she's documenting her cramming journey for an exam in three days, admitting she's 'so behind on material'. She states exams count for a larger portion of her grade, which is 'quite scary', and outlines her study plan for the Tuesday exam, believing 'three full days to study' is 'more than enough time' if used productively, covering cardiovascular, renal, and respiratory systems. Later, the woman, wearing a beige zip-up hoodie, speaks to the camera about her master’s program, stating, "hopefully a lot of it is review, but I also forgot about a lot of things," with on-screen text reinforcing her thoughts. Upbeat, whimsical music with xylophone and percussion begins as she walks through a brightly lit grocery store aisle filled with colorful cereal boxes. Back in the kitchen, she prepares a layered dessert in a clear glass jar, adding yogurt, banana cream pudding powder with scraping sounds, fresh strawberries with cutting sounds, and cereal from a pink and blue box with pouring sounds, creating a layered parfait, with on-screen text prompting "gotta eat these while they're still fresh" and "+ some cereal" before she takes a big bite with audible chewing. She then makes coffee using a silver espresso machine; water is poured into the reservoir, followed by whirring and brewing sounds as a shot is brewed into a blue glass cup, with on-screen text emphasizing 'caffeine caffeine caffeine' as the coffee flows, concluding with a clink sound as the cup is moved.

On-Screen Text.description: Yellow and white text overlays such as 'which I have hopefully done', 'But I also forgot about a lot of things', 'banana cream pudding powder', 'gotta eat these while they're still fresh', '+ some cereal', 'big bite', and 'caffeine caffeine caffeine', providing context and commentary.

Stir-Fry Pan.description: A white pan with a colorful stir-fry of vegetables and meat, being stirred with wooden chopsticks in a kitchen.

Smoothie Jar.description: A clear glass jar used to assemble a layered dessert, containing yogurt, banana cream pudding, strawberries, and cereal, stirred with a wooden spoon, accompanied by distinct scraping sounds during preparation.

Woman.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a beige zip-up hoodie, seen preparing food and coffee in a kitchen setting, with subtle hand gestures and focused expressions. She speaks clearly and reflectively about her master's program and forgetting things, and is later heard chewing her dessert.

Laptop.description: A silver laptop with a visibly greasy keyboard, shown in close-up as the woman types and comments on its condition, which is also highlighted by on-screen text 'My keyboard is so greasy LOL'.

Strawberries.description: Fresh red strawberries in a clear plastic container, being cut and added to the dessert jar, with audible cutting sounds during their preparation.

Cereal Box.description: A pink and blue cereal box labeled '13g protein', from which cereal is poured into the jar as a topping for the parfait, accompanied by distinct pouring sounds.

Grocery Store Aisle.description: A brightly lit supermarket aisle filled with colorful cereal boxes, including brands like Cheerios, Kashi, and Golden Grahams, with the Woman walking through it, all set to an upbeat, whimsical background music track featuring a xylophone melody and light percussion.

Blue Glass Cup.description: A vibrant blue glass cup placed under the espresso machine, receiving the freshly brewed coffee shot, with a final 'clink' sound heard as it's moved or placed.

Espresso Machine.description: A modern silver espresso machine with a blue glass cup placed under the spout, used to brew coffee, with water being poured into its reservoir, accompanied by distinct sounds of water pouring, whirring, and brewing coffee.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a serene indoor scene, where sunlight streams through blinds, casting striped shadows across a modern living space featuring a large green leafy plant and a cozy seating area, all set to gentle, calming background music with piano and strings. The visuals transition to a close-up of a hand stirring a colorful stir-fry in a white pan, followed by a woman in a white shirt eating the home-cooked meal with chopsticks, suggesting a healthy lifestyle. She then appears in a kitchen, now in a beige hoodie, preparing a colorful smoothie in a clear glass jar with a spoon, emphasizing a routine of self-care. The scene shifts to a clean, minimalistic study environment where the woman, wearing glasses and a beige zip-up hoodie, sits at a desk with a silver laptop, humorously noting its visibly greasy keyboard, a detail reinforced by on-screen text like 'My keyboard is so greasy LOL'. Amidst the continuous calming music, a brief, muffled male voice is heard, possibly from a lecture or recording, discussing a medical or legal case: 'where we got a lawyer who I wrote the medical part... apartment complex people causes him to this school and he would end up dead from that, right?', indicating her study material. After a distinct huff, the woman, whose voice is slightly hoarse (as explained by on-screen text 'pls excuse my voice I was sick ^o^'), speaks directly to the camera. She explains it's her second semester of first-year medical school and she's documenting her cramming journey for an exam in three days, admitting she's 'so behind on material'. She details that this semester's exams count for a larger portion of her grade, which is 'quite scary', and outlines her study plan, noting she has 'three full days to study' for the exam on Tuesday, believing it's 'more than enough time' if used productively. She mentions the exam covers cardiovascular, renal, and respiratory systems, topics she has 'learned before'. The soft lighting and calm atmosphere reflect her disciplined yet personal study routine.

The video opens with a young woman, wearing a beige zip-up hoodie, speaking directly to the camera in a casual indoor setting, reflecting in a clear, reflective voice on her master’s program, stating, "hopefully a lot of it is review, but I also forgot about a lot of things." On-screen text reinforces her thoughts. An upbeat, whimsical background music track, featuring a xylophone melody and light percussion, begins as the scene transitions to a brightly lit grocery store aisle filled with colorful cereal boxes, where she walks through, suggesting a shopping trip. Back in the cozy, naturally lit kitchen, she prepares a layered dessert in a clear glass jar, starting by adding yogurt, then banana cream pudding powder (as indicated by on-screen text), stirring the mixture with distinct scraping sounds. She then adds fresh strawberries, accompanied by audible cutting sounds, followed by cereal from a pink and blue box, with pouring sounds, creating a layered parfait. On-screen text prompts "gotta eat these while they're still fresh" and "+ some cereal" before she takes a big bite, savoring the treat with audible chewing. The scene shifts to her making coffee using a modern silver espresso machine; water is poured into the reservoir, followed by distinct whirring and brewing sounds as a shot is brewed into a vibrant blue glass cup, with on-screen text emphasizing 'caffeine caffeine caffeine' as the coffee flows, concluding with a final clink sound as the cup is moved.

event_blocks.summary: A young woman begins her day by preparing to study at a white desk beside her bed, opening her silver laptop which displays notes and a calendar, with on-screen text indicating her intention to study. Upbeat pop music with female vocals plays as she types, occasionally checking a grey mechanical timer and a blue glass cup. The scene shifts to a steaming pot of shabu shabu for dinner, with bubbling sounds and chopsticks stirring ingredients. The next day, January 14th, she wakes up in a sunlit room, stretches beside her bed adorned with plush toys, and then walks to a laundry area. She retrieves a green bag of Gain laundry detergent from a white cabinet, preparing to do laundry. Later, in a brightly lit yellow-walled laundry room, she loads clothes into a washing machine, with on-screen text 'it's laundry day ✨' and upbeat acoustic pop music playing. She then interacts with a dryer, checking her phone. Speaking to the camera, she expresses her goal to finish studying for a test, acknowledging the potential unreality of the plan. She returns to her white desk, typing on a white keyboard with a grey cloud-design mousepad, focusing on her MacBook Pro screen which shows medical study notes and objectives. She explains that test questions are derived from these objectives, and she is taking notes accordingly. The minute concludes in a kitchen where she cooks a stir-fry in a white pan, adding carrots and green onions, with sizzling and chopping sounds, before scraping the cooked vegetables into a large metal bowl.

On-Screen Text.description: White text overlays such as 'it's laundry day ✨', 'I'm going to try to finish studying today', and 'The test questions come from these list of objectives', which visually reinforce the Woman's spoken narrative.

Stir-Fry Pan.description: A white pan used for cooking a vegetable stir-fry on a stovetop, with shredded carrots and green onions being added, accompanied by distinct sizzling sounds during cooking.

Laundry Detergent.description: A green bag of Gain laundry detergent, retrieved from a cabinet by the woman during her morning routine.

Bed.description: A bed with a beige comforter, white sheets, and plush toys, positioned beside the desk and later shown with sunlight streaming across it.

Laptop.description: A MacBook Pro displaying a split-screen of medical study notes and objectives, which the Woman uses for studying, explaining that she is 'writing down some notes' based on 'test questions' from 'objectives' shown on the screen.

Plush Toys.description: Two brown plush toys resembling animals, placed on the bed behind the woman during her study session.

Blue Glass Cup.description: A vibrant blue glass cup placed on the desk beside the laptop, remaining unused during the study session.

Laundry Cabinet.description: A white cabinet with shelves, located near a washing machine, from which the woman takes the detergent.

Woman.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a white graphic t-shirt and black sweatpants with white stripes, seen performing laundry tasks, studying, and cooking. She speaks in a clear, conversational tone about her study plans and test preparation, and is heard making cooking sounds like sizzling and scraping.

Timer.description: A square, grey mechanical timer with a rotating dial, placed on the desk beside the laptop during the study session, potentially contributing to the initial mechanical whirring sound.

Keyboard.description: A white mechanical keyboard with a grey base, placed on the desk, used by the Woman for typing during her study session.

Metal Bowl.description: A large, shiny metal bowl used to receive the cooked vegetables from the stir-fry pan, with scraping sounds heard as the food is transferred into it.

Mousepad.description: A grey mousepad with a white cloud design, placed on the desk beside the keyboard.

Desk.description: A white desk with a keyboard, mousepad, and laptop, where the Woman studies, positioned in a well-lit room with a mirror and window in the background.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a young woman in a beige zip-up hoodie sitting at a small white desk beside her bed, preparing to study. A distinct mechanical whirring sound accompanies the scene as she opens her silver laptop, which displays a split-screen of notes and a calendar, with on-screen text 'okay let's start studying (9>ᴗ<)9'. Upbeat pop music with female vocals, singing lines like "I just sing along to my stereo" and "call my phone now, call my stereo now," plays as she types intently, occasionally glancing at a grey mechanical timer and a blue glass cup. The scene transitions to a close-up of a steaming white pot of shabu shabu, with on-screen text 'shabu shabu for dinner!', accompanied by the clear sound of liquid bubbling and boiling as chopsticks stir noodles, vegetables, and thinly sliced meat. The next scene shifts to a sunlit room on 'Jan 14', where the woman, now in a white graphic t-shirt and grey sweatpants, wakes up and stretches beside her bed, which has a beige comforter and plush toys. Calm, acoustic guitar music with a soft female vocal singing "I look in the mirror, it's looking back at me" plays as she then walks to a laundry area, opens a white cabinet, and retrieves a green bag of Gain laundry detergent, preparing to do laundry. The lighting remains warm and natural throughout, emphasizing a calm, routine-driven day.

The minute opens in a brightly lit, yellow-walled laundry room where a young woman, wearing a white graphic t-shirt and black sweatpants with white stripes, loads clothes into a front-loading washing machine. On-screen text 'it's laundry day ✨' appears as upbeat, acoustic guitar-driven pop music with male vocals plays, singing about a breakup. She closes the machine, walks away, then returns to interact with a dryer, pressing buttons on its control panel while checking her phone. The music continues before transitioning to a close-up of the woman's face as she speaks directly to the camera in a clear, conversational tone, stating, "I'm going to try to finish studying today so that tomorrow is just purely testing my knowledge. Maybe that's unrealistic. We'll see." She then sits at a white desk, typing on a white keyboard with a grey cloud-design mousepad, appearing focused. The pop music resumes softly. A close-up of her MacBook Pro screen displays a split-screen of complex medical study notes and a list of objectives, as she explains, "The test questions come from these list of objectives and some professors do a good job at telling you specifically what you need to know. So I'm just going through this list and writing down some notes." The final scene shifts to a kitchen, where she is cooking a stir-fry in a white pan on a stovetop, adding shredded carrots and green onions, accompanied by distinct sizzling and chopping sounds. She then scrapes the cooked vegetables into a large, shiny metal bowl, with the pop music still playing in the background.

event_blocks.summary: The narrative begins with a Woman preparing bibimbap, adding sauce to ingredients in a metal bowl, as indicated by on-screen text. She then transitions to studying intently on her MacBook Pro at a desk cluttered with a blue glass cup, headphones, and a grey mechanical timer, with sunlight streaming through the window. As dusk falls, she declares her determination to complete 992 Anki cards, acknowledging the potential delusion but committing to the effort. The scene shifts to a modern kitchen where she, wearing smiley-face slippers, uses a light blue Air Fryer to cook frozen vegetables from a blue and yellow bag, with on-screen text noting 'dinner time ツ'. Later, dressed in a beige ribbed cardigan, she places a Korean-labeled Frozen Vegetable Bag into the Air Fryer, which beeps after cooking. She plates the vegetables, adds meat, and eats on the floor, visibly tired, as upbeat Korean pop music plays. The scene then shows her studying at a desk with a Christmas tree, followed by a time-lapse at a kitchen counter with a PRIME drink bottle and grocery bag, as a calendar flips to 'Jan 15'. In the morning, wearing a grey 'ESSENTIALS FEAR OF GOD' hoodie, she makes a smoothie with yogurt and frozen blueberries, and prepares a matcha beverage using an electric kettle and a blue carton. She expresses frustration about outdated Anki decks and a persistent cough. Retrieving a brown cardboard package from the front door, she later cuts tape on it at the kitchen counter, revealing it contains energy drinks. She places the energy drink box in the refrigerator. The scene shifts to her studying at a white desk, typing on a mechanical keyboard, using a tablet with a stylus, and navigating a mouse on a cloud-design mousepad, with an audible timer ticking. She takes a study break to watch a K-drama on her MacBook Pro and eats leftover bibimbap from a plastic container, as the lighting transitions from daylight to evening.

Frozen Vegetable Bag.description: A blue and yellow bag of frozen vegetables, labeled in Korean, retrieved from the refrigerator and placed into the air fryer for cooking.

On-Screen Text.description: White text overlays such as 'I already know what it is (๑>ᴗ<๑) 🌸', 'more energy drinks heh ٩(◕‿◕｡)۶', 'study break', and 'eating leftover bibimbap', providing narrative context.

Air Fryer Basket.description: A black, perforated basket inside the light blue air fryer, used to hold the frozen vegetables during cooking, making sounds as it's moved.

Metal Bowl.description: A large, shiny metal bowl used to mix ingredients for bibimbap, with sauce being poured and stirred.

Refrigerator.description: A stainless steel refrigerator, heard opening and closing as energy drinks are placed inside.

Laptop.description: A MacBook Pro displaying study materials, placed on a stand at the desk, later showing a K-drama during the study break.

Air Fryer.description: A light blue air fryer with a pull-out basket, used to cook frozen vegetables quickly in the kitchen, emitting distinct whirring and beeping sounds during operation.

Blue Glass Cup.description: A vibrant blue glass cup placed on the desk beside the laptop, remaining unused during the study session.

Slippers.description: Cozy, beige slippers with a yellow smiley face, worn by the Woman while cooking in the kitchen.

Desk.description: A white desk with a keyboard, mousepad, timer, and various study items, where the Woman studies and takes a break.

Woman.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a grey hoodie with 'ESSENTIALS FEAR OF GOD' printed on the back, whose actions are accompanied by sounds of tape cutting, package rustling, refrigerator opening and closing, keyboard typing, mouse clicking, and eating from a plastic container while watching a K-drama.

Timer.description: A square, grey mechanical timer with a rotating dial, heard ticking audibly beside the keyboard.

Grocery Bag.description: A white plastic grocery bag with green branding, visible on the kitchen counter during the study session.

Kitchen Counter.description: A white marble kitchen counter with various appliances and items, including the Air Fryer, PRIME drink bottle, and grocery bag, where the Woman studies and prepares food.

Calendar.description: A black calendar with white text, flipping to 'Jan 15', shown in a close-up shot.

PRIME Drink Bottle.description: A pink bottle labeled 'PRIME' with a straw, placed on the kitchen counter during the study session.

Grey Hoodie.description: A grey hoodie with 'ESSENTIALS FEAR OF GOD' printed in black on the back, worn by the Woman during the breakfast preparation scene.

Window.description: A large window with blinds, showing sunlight streaming through and casting striped shadows on the wall and bed.

Christmas Tree.description: A small, decorated Christmas tree with gold and white ornaments, visible behind the Woman while she studies at the desk.

Front Door.description: A white interior door with a silver doorknob, through which the Woman retrieves a package, with a light blue H&M tote bag hanging on the wall beside it.

Cardboard Package.description: A brown cardboard box, opened by the Woman, with audible sounds of tape being cut and the package rustling.

Electric Kettle.description: A black and silver electric kettle with a transparent water chamber and a blue LED light at the base, heard boiling water for the matcha drink.

Matcha Powder.description: A small container of green matcha powder, poured into the mason jar to make a green tea beverage.

Blue-Light Glasses.description: Round, thin-framed glasses with a blue tint, placed on the desk beside the tablet, reflecting screen light.

Blue Carton.description: A blue carton, likely containing oat milk or another plant-based milk, poured into the mason jar to mix with the matcha.

Smoothie Jar.description: A clear glass jar used to assemble a layered breakfast smoothie, containing yogurt and frozen blueberries, later used for the matcha drink.

Energy Drink Box.description: A colorful box containing multiple cans of energy drinks, including brands like 'PRIME', 'ARCTIC Vibe', and 'Flant', placed into the refrigerator.

Keyboard.description: A white mechanical keyboard with a grey base, producing distinct typing sounds during the study session.

Mousepad.description: A grey mousepad with a white cloud design, where a white mouse rests, producing audible clicking sounds.

Tablet.description: A tablet in a white case, propped up on the desk, displaying split-screen study materials and being interacted with using a white stylus.

Plastic Container.description: A clear plastic container filled with leftover bibimbap, from which the Woman eats, accompanied by audible eating sounds.

Stylus.description: A white stylus used by the Woman to write and navigate on the tablet screen.

K-Drama Scene.description: A romantic scene from a K-drama playing on the MacBook Pro screen during the study break, with on-screen text 'k-drama is marry my husband'.

Energy Drink Cans.description: Multiple cans of energy drinks, including 'PRIME', 'ARCTIC Vibe', and 'Flant', visible inside the refrigerator and later on the desk.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a close-up of hands mixing ingredients in a large metal bowl, adding a dark sauce and stirring with a wooden spoon, all set to upbeat, light instrumental music, with on-screen text indicating 'making bibimbap~'. The scene transitions to a timelapse of a young Woman, wearing a beige ribbed cardigan, studying intently on her MacBook Pro, which displays split-screen study materials on a white desk. Sunlight streams through the window, casting long shadows that gradually fade into dusk, illuminating the cluttered desk with a lamp, a blue glass cup, headphones, and a grey mechanical timer. As night falls, the room darkens, and the Woman turns to the camera, her determined expression visible. Her voice, clear and resolute, states, "I am determined to get through 992 Anki cards today. I'm not sleeping until I get through all of this." She then reflects, "I don't know if I'm delusional for thinking this is possible, but I'm going to try to make it happen," aligning with on-screen text about her being 'delusional'. The scene shifts to a modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances and light wood flooring. The Woman, now wearing cozy smiley-face slippers, opens a stainless steel refrigerator with a distinct sound, pulls out a blue and yellow bag of frozen vegetables with a rustling sound, and places them into a light blue air fryer, accompanied by the sounds of its basket being pulled out and pushed in. On-screen text reads 'dinner time ツ' and 'using the airfryer to cook something up quickly', as the upbeat instrumental music resumes.

The minute opens in the kitchen with the Woman, dressed in a beige ribbed cardigan over a white graphic t-shirt, preparing a meal. The light blue Air Fryer whirs and beeps as she places a Korean-labeled Frozen Vegetable Bag inside and sets the timer. After cooking, she pours the vegetables onto a white plate, adds meat, and eats on the floor, looking visibly tired, with on-screen text confirming 'so tired... z z 1'. Throughout this initial cooking and eating, an upbeat Korean pop song with female vocals plays. The scene transitions to her studying at a desk with a Laptop, a small decorated Christmas tree in the background, as the music continues. On-screen text 'stayed up until pretty late to finish studying' appears, followed by a time-lapse of her studying at a kitchen counter, where a pink PRIME drink bottle and a grocery bag are visible. The Korean pop music fades as a window shows sunlight streaming through blinds, and a calendar flips to 'Jan 15'. The final scene finds the Woman, now in a grey hoodie with 'ESSENTIALS FEAR OF GOD' on the back, opening the stainless steel Refrigerator to retrieve another bag of frozen vegetables, with the on-screen text 'Q: guess what I'm having for breakfast today' appearing in the bright, naturally lit kitchen, accompanied by a calm, muted instrumental track featuring guitar or ukulele.

The segment opens with a gentle, upbeat background music as a Woman, wearing a grey 'ESSENTIALS FEAR OF GOD' hoodie, prepares her breakfast. We hear scooping and pouring sounds as she adds yogurt and frozen blueberries from a 'Beneficial' bag into a glass jar for a smoothie. She then uses a black electric kettle, which audibly boils, to heat water before pouring it into a mason jar, adding matcha powder and a liquid from a blue carton to create a green tea beverage. Sitting at a desk with blue-light glasses, the Woman speaks directly to the camera in a clear, conversational tone, expressing frustration about not studying her Anki cards due to outdated decks and feeling unwell, mentioning a persistent cough, which she audibly demonstrates. She states, "I feel like I've been sick for the past month. It just keeps coming back." The scene shifts as she stands, walks to the front door, and retrieves a brown cardboard package, accompanied by on-screen text 'I got a package! 📦' and sounds of handling the package, all while the background music continues.

The minute begins with a lo-fi hip-hop beat as a Woman, in a grey 'ESSENTIALS FEAR OF GOD' hoodie, uses a tool to cut tape on a brown Cardboard Package on a kitchen counter, accompanied by the distinct sound of tape being sliced and package rustling. On-screen text reveals 'I already know what it is (๑>ᴗ<๑) 🌸' and 'more energy drinks heh ٩(◕‿◕｡)۶'. She then opens a stainless steel Refrigerator with a clear sound of the door opening, places a colorful box of energy drinks inside, and closes the door. The scene transitions to a well-lit white Desk where she studies. The lo-fi music continues as she types on a white mechanical Keyboard, producing clear typing sounds, and navigates a tablet with a stylus, while mouse clicks are heard from a white mouse on a grey cloud-design Mousepad. A square grey Timer ticks audibly beside the keyboard. The tablet displays split-screen notes and a video. On-screen text indicates a 'study break' as she watches a K-drama, identified as 'k-drama is marry my husband', on an elevated MacBook Pro. The lo-fi music continues, now accompanied by eating sounds as she eats leftover bibimbap from a clear Plastic Container, with on-screen text 'eating leftover bibimbap'. The lighting shifts from bright daylight to softer evening tones, marking the passage of time.

event_blocks.summary: The Woman, initially in a grey hoodie at her desk with a laptop, smartphone, and mouse, eats bibimbap amidst K-drama-like music, then expresses stress and vocalizes her internal struggle, "What if I just gave up? What if I just dropped out?" as on-screen text mirrors her words. Declaring, "I need to focus," she shifts to her tablet, using a white stylus to navigate 'hematology exam content,' detailing 'hemostasis,' 'anemias,' and 'leukemias/lymphomas' through dense notes and diagrams. A video message from friends Pan and Ryan appears on her smartphone, offering encouragement like "good luck on your exam" and "Make that bread." Later, in an orange sweater, she smiles, relieved, stating, "I did pretty well on my exam. Now that my exam is over, I'm..." as on-screen text outlines her post-exam plans for cleaning and laundry, signifying a transition from stress to motivation. Subsequently, wearing an orange sweater and grey sweatpants, she addresses the camera, detailing her plans to "clean my apartment," including folding laundry, vacuuming, wiping floors, and taking down the Christmas tree, expressing pride in completing these chores despite admitting to procrastination until after her exams, with on-screen text reinforcing her dialogue and a rapid male voice discussing 'conflict' and 'desperation' in the background. The scene transitions to a bedroom where she methodically folds a large pile of laundry on the floor next to a bed, placing sorted clothes into a beige laundry basket as upbeat, electronic instrumental music begins. In a sunlit living room, she carefully dismantles a Christmas Tree, removing gold and white ornaments into a clear plastic container with clinking and rattling sounds, then vacuums the living room floor around a white circular rug and white sofa, the vacuum's whirring audible over the music.

On-Screen Text.description: White text overlays such as 'wipe down my books, take down the Christmas tree', 'I pride myself in doing these small chores', and 'Taking down the christmas tree' appear during the video.

Video Message.description: A video message from friends Pan and Ryan, displayed on the smartphone screen, showing encouragement and support for the Woman's exam, with their distinct male voices cheering her on.

Tablet.description: A tablet in a white case, propped up on the desk, displaying detailed hematology study materials with colorful notes, diagrams, and tables, interacted with using a white stylus.

Laptop.description: A MacBook Pro on the desk, initially displaying study materials, later showing a K-drama during the study break.

Smartphone.description: A black smartphone on the desk, later shown playing a video message from friends Pan and Ryan, whose distinct male voices are heard offering encouragement.

Stylus.description: A white stylus used by the Woman to navigate and highlight content on the tablet screen.

Desk.description: A white desk with a keyboard, mousepad, and various study items, where the Woman studies and takes a break.

Woman.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair tied in a bun, wearing an orange sweater and grey sweatpants. She speaks directly to the camera, expressing her pride in doing household chores herself and detailing her plans to 'fold my laundry,' 'vacuum,' 'wipe down my floors,' and 'take down the Christmas tree,' while also mentioning her tendency to procrastinate until after exams. She is actively engaged in these household chores.

Rug.description: A beige and white geometric-patterned rug with fringed edges, placed on the wooden floor in the bedroom and later in the living room.

Bed.description: A bed with a beige comforter and white sheets, partially visible in the bedroom scene, with a large pile of laundry on the floor beside it.

Laundry Basket.description: A beige, foldable laundry basket with wooden handles, used to collect sorted clothes after folding.

White Sofa.description: A modern, plush white sofa with rounded edges, positioned in the living room, partially covered with a blanket and a laptop.

Folding Rug.description: A beige and white geometric-patterned rug with fringed edges, initially seen under the laundry pile and later folded and placed neatly on the floor after cleaning.

Clear Plastic Container.description: A transparent plastic container used to collect and store Christmas tree ornaments during the dismantling process.

Vacuum Cleaner.description: A black cordless stick vacuum cleaner with a grey head, used to clean the living room floor. Its distinct whirring sound is clearly audible as it operates.

Christmas Tree.description: A small, artificial Christmas tree with green branches, decorated with gold and white ornaments, being dismantled and stored in a clear plastic container.

Living Room.description: A bright, modern living room with light wooden flooring, large glass doors leading to a balcony, and contemporary furniture including a white sofa and a small round table.

raw_segments: The video opens with the Woman, in a grey hoodie, eating bibimbap at her white desk, where a laptop, smartphone, and mouse are visible, accompanied by upbeat, slightly melancholic K-drama-like music. Her expression then shifts to stress, and her internal struggle is voiced aloud, "What if I just gave up? What if I just dropped out?" as the corresponding text appears on screen. Stating, "I need to focus," her voice becomes instructional as the camera focuses on her tablet, where she uses a white stylus to navigate detailed 'hematology exam content', explaining topics like 'hemostasis', 'anemias', and 'leukemias/lymphomas' while scrolling through dense notes and diagrams. A video message from her friends Pan and Ryan then appears on her smartphone, with their distinct voices cheering her on with "good luck on your exam," "Let's go, you're a, let's go," and "Make that bread." The scene concludes with the Woman, now in an orange sweater, smiling and gesturing, her voice expressing relief, "I did pretty well on my exam. Now that my exam is over, I'm..." as on-screen text outlines her post-exam plans to clean and do laundry, emphasizing her journey from stress to motivation.

The video opens with a close-up of the Woman, wearing an orange sweater and grey sweatpants, speaking directly to the camera. She articulates her plans to "clean my apartment," detailing tasks such as folding laundry, vacuuming, wiping floors, and taking down the Christmas tree, emphasizing her pride in doing these small chores herself and admitting to procrastinating until after her exams. On-screen text like 'wipe down my books, take down the Christmas tree' and 'I pride myself in doing these small chores' reinforces her dialogue. Throughout her speech, a rapid male voice can be heard in the background, discussing numbers and concepts like 'conflict' and 'desperation,' suggesting a podcast or video playing. The scene transitions to a bedroom where she is seen methodically folding a large pile of laundry on the floor next to a bed, then gathering the sorted clothes into a beige laundry basket. Upbeat, slightly electronic instrumental music begins to play, continuing through the subsequent scenes. The setting shifts to a sunlit living room where she carefully takes down the Christmas Tree, removing gold and white ornaments and placing them into a clear plastic container, accompanied by distinct clinking and rattling sounds. After disassembling the tree, she vacuums the living room floor around a white circular rug and modern furniture, including a white sofa, with the clear, consistent whirring sound of the vacuum cleaner audible over the background music.

event_blocks.summary: A woman in an orange sweater and grey sweatpants vacuums a living room, navigating around a white sofa and a small round table, the whirring of the vacuum cleaner and melodic background music audible. She then moves to the kitchen, sweeping near the sink and counter, which is cluttered with a cutting board, paper towels, and a phone. After wiping the counter, she places a white pot on the stove and adjusts its settings as a soft female voice sings, "Pay attention to the sound, the one that's coming from your mouth. Don't mean to turn it upside down. I really wanna hear you out." The scene transitions to her vacuuming a bedroom containing a bed and a small desk, with the music and vocals continuing. A dark hallway with an opening door is shown, followed by a staircase overlaid with the text 'another day at school...', and then a view from a car driving down a tree-lined street, all accompanied by new, ambient, and melancholic instrumental music. Later, in a nighttime living room, the woman, now wearing a purple and blue 'La Jam' sweatshirt, sits on the white sofa with a silver MacBook Pro on her lap, typing intensely. A close-up of her hands reveals rapid keyboard clicks as on-screen text highlights the urgency: 'finishing up an assignment that's due in 5 hours'.

Bedroom.description: A simple bedroom with a bed covered in a beige comforter, a small desk, and a large plant in the corner, where the woman vacuums the floor, accompanied by background music.

Nighttime Living Room.description: The same living room as before, but now at night with city lights visible through the glass doors, creating a dim, focused atmosphere for studying, with ambient music and the distinct sound of typing.

Kitchen Counter.description: A white marble kitchen counter with various items including a cutting board, paper towels, a phone, and a sink with a faucet, where the woman sweeps and wipes, while melodic music featuring a female vocalist plays in the background.

Stove.description: A black electric stove with a white pot placed on it, used by the woman to prepare something, while a female vocalist sings softly in the background.

Living Room.description: A bright, modern living room with light wooden flooring, large glass doors leading to a balcony, and contemporary furniture including a white sofa and a small round table, later seen at night with city lights visible through the glass doors, creating a dim, focused atmosphere for studying, accompanied by background music and typing sounds.

Woman.description: A young woman with shoulder-length brown hair tied in a bun, initially wearing an orange sweater and grey sweatpants while vacuuming to the prominent whirring sound of the vacuum cleaner and melodic music, later seen in a purple and blue 'La Jam' sweatshirt while working intensely on a laptop at night, her rapid typing clearly audible.

On-Screen Text.description: White text overlays such as 'another day at school...' and 'finishing up an assignment that's due in 5 hours' appear during the video, providing context to the scenes, with the latter coinciding with the audible sound of typing.

Vacuum Cleaner.description: A black cordless stick vacuum cleaner with a grey head, used to clean the living room and bedroom floors, producing a distinct whirring sound that is prominent during its use.

raw_segments: The video opens with a young woman, dressed in an orange sweater and grey sweatpants, diligently vacuuming the living room, maneuvering around a white sofa and a small round table, accompanied by the distinct whirring of the vacuum cleaner and a gentle, melodic background music. She then moves to the kitchen, sweeping the floor near the sink and counter, which holds various items like a cutting board, paper towels, and a phone, all while the melodic music continues. She briefly pauses to wipe the counter before returning to the stove, where she places a white pot on the burner and adjusts the settings, as a soft female voice begins to sing, "Pay attention to the sound, the one that's coming from your mouth. Don't mean to turn it upside down. I really wanna hear you out." The scene then shifts to her vacuuming a bedroom with a bed and a small desk, with the melodic music and soft vocals continuing in the background. A cut to a dark hallway with a door opening is followed by a staircase scene overlaid with the text 'another day at school...', and then a view from a car driving down a tree-lined street, all set to a new, more ambient and slightly melancholic instrumental music. The video then cuts to nighttime in the living room, where the woman, now in a purple and blue 'La Jam' sweatshirt, sits on the white sofa with a silver MacBook Pro on her lap, typing intensely. A close-up of her hands shows her rapidly typing, accompanied by the clear sound of keyboard clicks, as on-screen text emphasizes the urgency: 'finishing up an assignment that's due in 5 hours'.

event_blocks.summary: The narrative begins with a close-up of a silver MacBook Pro screen displaying a medical ultrasound image of 'Pericardial Effusion,' accompanied by a male voice discussing "pericardial fluid" and "retrospective review." The scene shifts to a living room where a grey tabby cat sits on a white sofa next to the laptop, observed by a woman in a purple and blue 'La Jam' sweatshirt who affectionately speaks to the cat, "This cat keeps coming into my apartment," and "I think she loves me," to which the cat meows and purrs, while on-screen text reads 'You’re so cute' and 'I think he loves me.' Melodic background music starts as the woman moves to a kitchen counter, sips a Celsius Arctic Vibe energy drink with an audible sip, and continues working on her laptop, now showing a heart and liver diagram with the male voice narrating "probe selection" and "sound waves through the liver," briefly intercut with a music platform interface. Later, she retrieves a frozen vegetable bag from the refrigerator, making rustling sounds, and places it into a light blue air fryer with a thud, preparing a 'midnight snack : °☆彡.' The woman, in her sweatshirt, then places the frozen vegetables into the air fryer basket on the kitchen counter, which whirs mechanically before a soft ding signals completion. She removes a golden-brown, fish-shaped snack, placing it on a white plate. Transitioning to the living room, she sits on the white sofa, eating the snack while watching 'Exchange Season 3' on her MacBook Pro, with Korean dialogue and on-screen text confirming the show. As she eats, 'crunch asmr' appears on-screen, the K-drama dialogue fades, and gentle, acoustic background music with a melancholic female vocal begins. The video concludes with a pastel outro screen displaying social media handles and a thank you message, while the music continues with the female vocal singing "Pay attention to the sound, the one that's coming from..."

Cat.description: A grey tabby cat with white paws and a striped coat, sitting on the white sofa, curiously observing the laptop screen and the woman, responding with soft meows and purrs to her affectionate words.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a close-up of a silver MacBook Pro screen displaying a medical ultrasound image labeled 'Pericardial Effusion,' accompanied by a male voice narrating medical information about "pericardial fluid" and "retrospective review." The scene then transitions to a cozy living room where a grey tabby cat with white paws sits on a plush white sofa beside the laptop, curiously observing the screen. A young woman, wearing a purple and blue 'La Jam' sweatshirt, interacts affectionately with the cat, speaking in a gentle voice, saying, "This cat keeps coming into my apartment," and "I think she loves me," followed by "You're so cute" and "Do you know you're cute?" The cat responds with soft meows and purrs, while on-screen text reinforces the sentiment with 'You’re so cute' and 'I think he loves me.' A gentle, melodic background music track begins as the woman shifts to the modern kitchen counter, sipping from a silver Celsius Arctic Vibe energy drink with an audible sip. She continues to work on her laptop, which now displays a medical diagram of the heart and liver, with the male voice continuing its narration, discussing "probe selection" and "sound waves through the liver," even as the laptop screen briefly shows a music platform interface where she browses for tracks. Later, the woman retrieves a brown and white bag of frozen vegetables from the stainless steel refrigerator, making rustling sounds, and places them into a light blue air fryer with a distinct thud, preparing a 'midnight snack : °☆彡' as the background music continues.

The video opens with the Woman, wearing her purple and blue 'La Jam' sweatshirt, in the kitchen. She places a bag of frozen vegetables into the light blue Air Fryer basket, which makes a distinct mechanical whirring sound as she operates it on the white marble Kitchen Counter. A soft ding signals the Air Fryer's completion, and she then removes the cooked, golden-brown, fish-shaped snack, placing it on a white plate, with the sound of the basket being pulled out and pushed back in. The scene transitions to the Woman sitting on a plush white sofa in the cozy Living Room, casually eating the snack while engrossed in a K-drama on her silver MacBook Pro. The laptop displays 'Exchange Season 3' with on-screen text confirming this, and clear Korean dialogue from the show is heard, featuring a male voice discussing content and enthusiasts. As she continues to eat, the on-screen text 'crunch asmr' appears, and the K-drama dialogue fades, replaced by gentle, acoustic background music featuring a soft, melancholic female vocal. The video concludes with a soft, pastel-colored outro screen displaying social media handles and a thank you message, while the gentle background music continues with the female vocal singing "Pay attention to the sound, the one that's coming from..."
